posts.text:
As Democrats, we should be using our power to fight for everyday people.

Far too often, corporate interests, billionaires, and right-wing lobbies come between politicians and the people who we have the responsibility to represent.

But we’re running a different kind of campaign.

Because I don’t take any money from the cryptocurrency PACs, Big Pharma, or other corporations, I can truly represent the people of St. Louis and bring our values back to Congress.

Join us at coribush.org

Video

posts.text:
The Trump administration’s oil embargo on Cuba has now shut down the nation's power grid, resulting in a humanitarian crisis for over ten million people.

Utilities, hospitals, and other critical infrastructure have ceased to function, putting countless lives at risk.

This is a senseless, vindictive act of economic warfare by President Trump. Congress must act now to end his embargo and stop this preventable crisis.

posts.text:
The political moment we’re in right now is different from 2 years ago. And it demands that we fight harder than ever.

This election, voters know what the incumbent in this race is really about, and what his priorities are. More people are familiar with AIPAC and other right-wing lobbies and how they influence our elections.

St. Louis deserves a fighter who will do everything they can for everyday people, even when it’s hard, and when corporate PACs and special interests don’t like it.

I’ve be

posts.text:
I’m ready to fight for everyday people because I know what it’s like to experience the injustices of our system.

I’ll always stand up for people who are unhoused, uninsured, and working low-wage jobs because I’ve been there before myself.

@Higher_Learning

Video

posts.text:
Rest in power Breonna Taylor. Today, we mourn six years without her, and six years without justice or accountability.

On this day in 2020, Breonna Taylor was killed by Louisville Metro Police Department officers after they forcibly entered her home. Although one of the officers responsible was eventually convicted of violating Taylor's civil rights, none were ever indicted for her murder.

As we take today to honor her memory, we also reflect on the struggle for justice that is as of yet unfini

posts.text:
I’ve been fighting for housing for all since before I was ever elected to Congress.

Housing must be protected as a fundamental human right. When people lose the roof over their heads, it’s so often followed by other devastating consequences, including job loss and worsening educational outcomes.

I personally know how expensive living in poverty can be, and I know what it’s like to be evicted, unhoused, and living in my car while raising my children.

Because I’ve been there before, I know what

posts.text:
This President’s agenda needs to be opposed at every possible opportunity.

Democrats must choose:

Do we want to give Trump a blank check to kill countless people in Iran, Lebanon, Gaza, and across the entire Middle East, or do we want to be a real opposition party?

You know where I stand already.

No MAGA imperialism, no forever wars, no war with Iran.


Crooked Media (@CrookedMedia)

“If you vote for the funding of this war, you should be primaried. I don’t want you in the Democratic Party.”
